name: common_sense_3fbbd161-bcf8-499d-a1d9-357673a1a861
prompt: A street vendor prepares a meal on a mobile kitchen set in the back of a pickup truck. The scene is captured in a medium shot from a high angle, illuminated by the soft light of an overcast day. The vendor, wearing a black long-sleeved top with a lighter black T-shirt underneath and a black apron with white stripes, is focused on his task. His face is partially obscured by a pink bandana with designs. He stands next to a green gas cylinder and a wooden table laden with food containers. A white scooter is parked beside the truck, which has various stickers on its back window.  In the bottom left corner, another person wearing a red apron over a light blue shirt, a white face mask, and a whitish bucket hat with text written in black letters pours a white powder from a metallic gray recipient into a clear container. The camera tilts down and to the right, following the vendor as he cracks an egg into a bowl held in his left hand and adds three different ingredients using a small spoon. He wears a ring on his right index finger. The vendor then pours liquid from a can into the bowl and stirs the contents with a small set of tongs. Steam rises from a frying pan on the bottom right, where sliced pieces of meat are being cooked. On the middle right, a wooden tabletop holds metallic bowls and a large stockpot with a ladle over it.  In the upper left background, another street food vendor is visible. A white car drives by in the street lane behind the food vendors. The wet asphalt reflects the overcast sky. A pink stool can be seen on the sidewalk in the upper right corner of the frame. The vendor continues his work, adding ingredients and stirring the mixture, creating a lively and bustling street food scene.
